text.title: AI-Assisted Accessibility Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Team uses Sonnet for everything including the mechanical filter. Cost balloons 5×.
antipattern.fix: Route filter/rank to Haiku, fix generation to Sonnet.

antipattern.symptom: AI fixes piped straight to Jira. Many false positives create dev backlash.
antipattern.fix: Hard-block ticket creation until expert validation event is recorded.

antipattern.symptom: Only axe used. pa11y-specific violations missed; partial audit.
antipattern.fix: Run both axe + pa11y on critical paths; union the violation set.
